final_prompt.prompt:
Create a tactical gear showcase display featuring firearms, body armor, and night vision equipment.

Style/medium: needs a "硬核军事" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Tom Clancy's Rainbow Six Siege operator loadout art, 2010s military contractor catalog photography, Soviet-era technical manual illustrations; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a flat-lay arrangement of tactical gear items neatly organized
Subject: must include firearms, body armor (防弹背心), and night vision equipment (夜视仪)
Scene/backdrop: must be a dark background
Lighting/mood: needs a cold, stern, professional and authoritative atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cold, muted direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
